sections.sectionTitle: Leibeel sunga Kikoih Kha tawh kisai Na

verses.text: Pasian in hong hehpihna tawh hih nasep hong pia ahih manin ka thaneem hetkei uh hi

Ka thuhilhna uhah mite khembawl loin, Pasian thu zong a manlopi-in ka gen kei uh a, tua bang a zumhuai simtham tatnate ka zang hetkei uh hi. Pasian muhna-ah a langtangin thuman takin ka gamta uh a, mi khempeuh a lungkim theihna dingin ka hanciam uh hi
Lungdamna thu ka hilhte uh kitello ahih leh zong siatna a thuak mite-a' ding bekin a kitello hi ding hi

Tua bang mite pen hih leitung pasian gilote in a lungsim mit uh tawsak ahih manin umlo uh a, Pasian tawh a kibang teekteek Khrih minthan'na hangin amaute tungah a hong taang lungdamna thu khuavak mu theilo uh hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh kote' hilh thu pen komau' thu hilo a, Khrih Jesuh pen Topa ahi hi, ci-in a hilh ka hi uh a, kote pen Khrih hangin nomau' na a semte ka hi uh hi
“Khuamial sung panin khuavak taang hen,” a ci Pasian mah in Jesuh' maitang a taangsak Pasian' vangliatna thu theihna ding khuavak ka ngahtheihna dingun kote lungsim sungah khuavak hong taangsak hi
Ahi zongin vangliatna taktak Pasian-a' hi a, kote-a' hilo hi, ci-in a kilatna dingin kha tawh kisai na manpha a nei kote pen na kikoihna leibeel tawh a kibang bek ka hi uh hi
Gimna ka tuah zelzel uh hangin ka si kei uh a, lunghihmawhna ka tuah zelzel uh hangin ka lungkia kei uh a
gal tampi ka neih uh hangin pawl ka kitasam ngeikei uh a, liamna baina ka tuah uh hangin ka si kei uh hi
Kote' pum tung panin Jesuh' nuntakna a kilat theihna dingin hih ka leitung pumpi nuntakna mahmah uhah zong Jesuh' sihna bangmah ka thuak zelzel uh hi
Tua ahih manin kote' leitung pumpi-ah Jesuh Khrih nuntakna a kilatna dingin Jesuh hangin ka leitung nuntak sungun sihna ding lauhuaina ka phukha tawntung uh hi
Tua ahih manin kote-a' dingin sihna ding a kisepsep laitakin note' nuntakna ding a kisem niloh ahi hi
Lai Siangtho in, “Um ka hih manin ka gen hi,” a cih mah bangin kote in zong um ka hih uh manin a gen ka hi uh hi
Topa Jesuh a hingkik sakpa in Jesuh mah tawh kote zong hong hingkik sak khawmin note tawh ama omna-ah hong paipih khawm ding hi, ci-in ka thei uh hi
Hih thute khempeuh note-a' ding a kikhualna hi a, Pasian' hehpihna in mi tam ban semsem leh mi a tam semsem mah in Pasian' minthan'na dingin lungdam ko-in thu ngen ding uh hi.
Tua thu hangin ka lungkia tuankei uh hi. Kote' leitung pumpi in damdamin muatlam ding a manawh ahi zongin ka kha nuntakna uh a nini-in thaksuak semsem hi
Tuhun laitakin tomno sung lungkhamna ka thuakte uh in ka thuakna uh sangin nakpi takin a lianzaw tawntung minthan'na sung hong tun'pih ding hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh a kimuthei nate a mitsuan' ka hi kei uh a, a kimu theilo nate a mitsuan' ka hi uh hi. A kimuthei nate tomno sung bek kimang a, a kimu theilo nate a tawntungin a kip ahi hi.
